programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank, the mayor, Erin and the DA's office deal with public outrage when a grand jury fails to indict an NYPD officer for the controversial shooting of a teen, which was caught on video.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Robert Lewis obtains new evidence against Danny in the shooting case of Thomas Wilder; Jamie and Eddie respond to a drunken driving accident involving a public figure; a slain police officer's wife asks Frank to keep her son out of the police force.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: A traumatized young woman who was held hostage is reluctant to press charges; a prominent NYPD fundraiser becomes a PR nightmare for Frank; Jamie is offered a job on a TV show.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: While responding to a complaint, Burgess and Sorensen find the body of a 16-year-old girl in a baseball player's (Billy Burke) house; Lindsay receives a mysterious delivery that might have ties to her past.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: When the only witness to the rape and murder of a young man gets killed, the team suspects that someone was paid to take the victim out; Antonio receives a job offer from the state attorney's office.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A highly trained killer is believed to be targeting the police department; Lindsay speaks to Antonio about his job with the state's attorney.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Severide is brought in for questioning after it is discovered that his car has been involved in a deadly crash; Lindsay considers meeting her estranged father.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Evidence from the case of a young woman who was shot to death confirms the Chicago P.D. has a serial killer on its hands; Voight welcomes Kenny Rixton to the team when Ruzek takes another assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a sex offender leads to a private police force operating independently of the Chicago PD; Halstead checks Jimmy's DNA to find out if he really is Lindsay's father.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A priest and parishioners block law enforcement from entering a church where two murder suspects are suspected of hiding; Rixton is caught in a lie with Voight.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: When the crushed body of a young teen who ran away from a treatment center for troubled girls is found in an abandoned building, Voight sends Halstead under cover as a guard to investigate the center from the inside.

programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: Hammer's on-again off-again flame is a Broadway star named Linda Fortunato, but her latest role is as primary suspect in the murder investigation of her ex-husband and co-star. The whole city is convinced of her guilt after the spatting couple was seen fighting during rehearsals, but Mike Hammer is determined to clear her name. Drama and mystery unfold while Hammer investigates a whole cast of suspects.

programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: After being released from his time in prison, Mike Hammer's old friend Herman Simpson joins him for dinner. The discussion turns techie when Simpson brings up the computer revolution that is underway. However, a bank robbery involving this same technology-- and a suspiciously similar criminal --takes place the same evening. Simpson becomes the prime suspect, and Hammer is his only hope at staying free.

programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: Mike's journalist friend, Pete, misses their scheduled meeting. But the apparent suicide raises questions that lead Mike to follow up on Pete's latest investigative assignment, an exposé on surveillance. Hammer finds out that Pete was writing about the shadows and powers behind modern surveillance, an entity known as Big Brother. Now Hammer must track down the killer that's always watching everybody.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: When a list of undercover CIA agents is stolen, the team enlists the help of Magnum, Higgins, Rick and TC to get it back and protect national security; Higgins gives Tani some personal advice.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Grover and the team investigate a murder at a private golf course involving a man who was frozen to death in the locker room's cryotherapy chamber; McGarrett tags along with Danny when he tracks down the father of a boy who has been bullying Charlie.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Soon after Danny meets the girl of his dreams, they get into a potentially fatal car accident in an area far from help; McGarrett enlists Quinn and Tani to help when Eddie the dog suddenly shows signs of post-traumatic stress disorder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: When Grover's niece goes missing from the police academy, it's discovered that her boyfriend is an undercover member of the yakuza.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Tani and Noelani are held hostage during a convenience store robbery; the team investigates the murder of a Thai diplomat whose wife confesses to the crime, but Danny suspects she's covering for the real killer.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: The shooting of a child in their neighborhood forces Cruz and his brother to think about the gang; Isabella gets Mills to dress up for a gala; Casey feels sad he will be seeing Dawson less; Shay gets in deeper with Devon.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Boden tries to keep the firehouse from closing; the romance between Dawson and Casey grows; Cruz worries for his brother's safety; Severide and Katie make up for lost time.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Chief Boden leads the fight to keep the firehouse open; an emergency call to an apartment structure puts the squad in harm's way; Dawson receives life-changing news.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Casey returns to work after a brush with death; Shay's new partner is friendly to everyone but her; Dawson begins training; Severide prepares for his instructor duties; Clarke refuses to talk to the police about the murder.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Casey tries to convince everyone he is healthy; Shay avoids the lawyer who wants to talk about Daryl's suicide; Otis and Katie grow closer; Boden helps a woman with a negligent landlord.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: A drunken driver takes out a transformer, leaving the entire neighborhood without power on a frigid night; Casey continues to lie about his condition.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Severide must leave Lindsay and the Intelligence Unit to find Katie; Blackhawk players Brent Seabrook and Duncan Keith give Shay a tip; Casey gets more information about his head injuries; Dawson works to pass the physical test.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Severide becomes frustrated with the police; a girl is trapped in a donation bin; a fire breaks out in a 20-story building downtown.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Detective Lindsay calls in suspects in the disappearance of Katie's kidnapper; Jones struggles to fit in; Herrmann celebrates his 20th wedding anniversary.

programme.desc: LaDainian Tomlinson scored three touchdowns Sunday to break the NFL single-season record with 29 TDs and help the Chargers beat the Broncos 48-20 to clinch the AFC West title.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Seattle Seahawks pull off the upset over the rival Oakland Raiders thanks to an all-time rushing performance from Shaun Alexander with 35 rushes for 266 yard and 3 touchdowns.

programme.desc: Matt Forte ran all over the Carolina Panthers defense for 205 yards rushing and a touchdown, Chicago Bears defense and special teams came up with scores in the first half as Chicago hangs on to win 34-29 over Panthers.

programme.desc: Highlights of the angriest runs of 2025.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jonathan Taylor's three touchdown performance keeps the Colts red-hot on the season as they beat Cam Ward and the Titans 41-20 on Sunday while Daniel Jones became the first player in NFL history to record three passing touchdowns, three rushing touchdowns, and zero turnovers in the first three games of a season.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Matt Hasselbeck threw four touchdown passes and Marshawn Lynch scored on an electrifying 67-yard run with 3:22 left to clinch the first playoff victory by a losing team.

programme.desc: Building the PERFECT running back since 2000 with Brett Kollmann.

programme.title: MLB Network Countdown
programme.desc: Relive baseball's most memorable moments from 2000 to 2009, including record-breaking home runs, perfect games, historic World Series wins, and more.

programme.title: Recap Rundown
programme.desc: Recap Rundown brings you all the action you missed!

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Ken Griffey Jr. defeats Jim Thome in the finals of the 1998 Home Run Derby at Coors Field

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The 1993 All-Star Game was held at Oriole Park at Camden Yards. The American League stands tall again in their 9-3 victory over the National League.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The National League battles back twice late in a thrilling victory, highlighted by clutch hits from Fred McGriff and Moises Alou. The 1994 MLB All-Star Game was the first NL win since 1987.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The Nationals take on the Phillies in the Little League Classic at Bowman Field in Williamsport, PA.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Ichiro Suzuki makes history in 2007 by hitting the first-ever inside-the-park home run during an All-Star Game. He was rewarded MVP for going 3-for-3 at the plate and collecting two RBIs in an American League victory, 5-4.

programme.title: FastCast
programme.desc: FastCast brings you the top moments from around the league and features the Game of the Night.

programme.title: World Series Film
programme.desc: The Red Sox defeat the Dodgers in five games for their ninth World Series title, fourth since 2004.

programme.title: Recap Rundown
programme.desc: Recap Rundown brings you all the action you missed!

programme.title: All-Star Highlights
programme.desc: Take a look at highlights from the first MLB All-Star Game played in San Diego in 1978. Rod Carew's two triples set an All-Star Game record, but the National League prevailed, winning 7-3.

programme.title: All-Star Highlights
programme.desc: Check out highlights from the 1979 All-Star Game. A gripping contest featuring a walk-off comeback win and highlights from Dave Parker, Fred Lynn and Lee Mazzilli.

programme.title: FastCast
programme.desc: FastCast brings you the top moments from around the league and features the Game of the Night.

programme.desc: See how Minor League Baseball is woven into the fabric of everyday life in Asheville, North Carolina

programme.desc: The comedian discusses why we aren’t honest about not wanting to attend events, lying to children, and so much more in this hilarious special.

programme.desc: The crew stages their own moon landing pageant as they watch the film Moon Zero Two (1969) about an astronaut hired to capture an asteroid made of sapphires.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: The search for an astronaut on an alien planet.

programme.desc: An intergalactic cop pursues a corrupt former partner; comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A bizarre ocean creature spreads panic throughout Florida after a botched scientific experiment in "Devilfish.".

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: "Deathstalker and the Warriors From Hell" a k a "Deathstalker III" (1989) Fantasy. A medieval hero (John Allen Nelson) meets twin princesses (Carla Herd) on a diamond quest.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: Perms, skimpy battle outfits and cheap effects abound in this 1978 Star Wars knockoff.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: The Castle of Fu Manchu tries to conquer the world by turning all water into ice.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G has a challenge on her hands: a victim's body spent days decaying before it was found, and decomposition could get in the way of her investigation.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Police make a grisly discovery: a woman's battered and dead body. With little evidence and no witnesses, Dr. G must identify the body and determine the cause of death to catch her killer.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An employee is found dead in a restaurant kitchen. Clues found near the body include an empty cash register, a knife and a trail of blood splotches leading to a vandalized car in the parking lot.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Chris Schaffer has not been seen or heard from in five days. Finally, his friends find him dead and decomposed in the driver's seat of his van.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When an infant dies under mysterious circumstances, the young parents are prime suspects. Dr. G discovers several clues that bolster the child abuse theory, but the case is not clear cut.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A decomposing body is found in a pond and a tent is found nearby. Dr. G performs the autopsy in the morgue but finds few clues other than fingerprints and mouthwash in the stomach.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A train passenger behaves oddly en route to Arizona and then disappears. The next day his bloodied body is found in Texas. Dr. G attempts to piece together this bizarre tragedy.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A diabetic man dies after a night out. Meanwhile, an elderly man's decomposing body is found in his son's home. Dr. G realizes that finding the causes of death will be anything but straight-forward.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Amanda Reese breaks out in hives and begins to hyperventilate after returning from a Hurricane Katrina relief effort. Dr. G wonders if an infection caused this young woman's untimely death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Rusty Updike has asked his ex-wife Vesta on a cruise. The couple haven't seen each other for 15 years but Vesta decides that a cruise with her ex might make for a nice change of pace.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: All circumstances point to foul play in the case of a dead hunter and the police fear that a killer is on the loose. Dr. G must provide them with answers before there are more victims.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Authorities respond to a fire, only to find Carolyn Casey's body at the center of the blaze. With little evidence and no witnesses, Dr. G must find the cause of death to catch her killer.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A 71-year-old man wakes in the middle of the night, gasping for air. Paramedics rush to save him, but it's all in vain: he's dead by the time they arrive. What caused his death?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: During her career as a medical examiner, Dr. G has autopsied thousands of murder victims. In this episode, Dr. G shares her most memorable case.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: 45-year-old Natalie, who's visiting her sister from Australia, is found dead the morning after a heated argument with her estranged brother-in-law. Dr. G suspects foul play and she must race against the clock to give the police and Natalie's family the answers they need.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: As each lead turns cold in a gruesome murder case, Dr. G worries justice may never be served. As the autopsy draws to a end, Dr. G uncovers a shocking clue that may solve this crime.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. Farley discusses the bizarre case of a pregnant mother who suddenly dies. As the autopsy unfolds, Dr. Farley uncovers information that could have saved her and her unborn child's life.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: In August of 1995, when Dr. G worked in Texas, a pile of human bones was found at a supposedly haunted railroad crossing. Dr. G was able to determine the age but not the sex.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Parents rush their baby to the hospital, but she tragically dies in her mother's arms. Now, Dr. G must help these devastated parents understand what happened.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Leo Guzman falls off a ladder while painting a house. At first, his death seems to be an open-and-shut case but, as the autopsy unfolds, Dr. G believes there may be more to this case.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A quadriplegic woman loved by her community is found dead in an Orlando park 150ft from her motorized wheelchair. Children find her lifeless body face down in the sand.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Melissa Riobe's life is ruled by her addiction to drugs. Now, the 42-year-old woman has learned how to buy powerful prescription drugs online without a doctor's note.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A teen is eating breakfast when his dad starts stabbing himself. As the investigation unfolds, police begin to doubt the story. Dr. G must determine if this was a suicide or a murder.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A woman is killed in a drunk driving accident. At first, her death seems to be an open-and-shut case, but Dr. G discovers clues that the woman may have played a key role in her own death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A neighbor hears odd sounds coming from the next apartment. When police arrive, they find a man bruised and dead. When all signs point to foul play, it's up to Dr. G to find proof of murder.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An elderly woman is driving when she's overcome with shooting pains and crashes her car. She's rushed to the hospital, but the doctors find nothing wrong. Can Dr. G find the cause of death?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Carol Moleskie agrees to go on a hunting excursion with her husband, Bob. A few hours after they enter the woods, they emerge again, Bob frantically waving down traffic as he carries his bloody wife.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G must determine if a teen boy died by taking his own life, but the autopsy leads to a more shocking and tragic conclusion.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It's an early Sunday morning when a local resident decides to take a short-cut through the church parking lot. Walking past a lone car, the resident can't believe his eyes.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When Dr. G receives Lea Conrad's body, she suspects the woman may have died from an antihistamine overdose. Then, Dr. G learns that Lea was being treated for lupus.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: After suffering an apparent seizure, 37-year-old Ruben Delgado is found lifeless by his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A teacher excuses himself for a nap after dinner, but he never wakes up. The man has a complex medical history that leads Dr. G on a hunt for an explanation to his mysterious death.

programme.desc: An embarrassing secret prohibits a heart attack patient from being rushed to the ER.

programme.desc: A woman complains of stomach pains after eating toilet paper. An inmate has a 108-degree fever.

programme.desc: A patient appears to be hallucinating and sends the ER staff on a wild-goose chase around the hospital.

programme.desc: A newlywed's hand gets stuck in an appliance and a woman appears to only have blood flow to half of her brain.

programme.desc: A doctor delivers a baby in a car and another one to parents unaware they were expecting.

programme.desc: A young boy is attacked by a shark and comes close to death as surgeons battle to save his life.

programme.desc: A live boa constrictor wrapped around a man's arm is biting his wrist and won't let go.

programme.desc: It’s no doubt that the ‘Ball Crusher’ Sweeper is the star of tonight’s show. With a brother- sister team hanging by a thread and a three-way hurdle, this week’s Sweeper writes itself into the History books. Tonight is also the night we meet Buffman, a pint sized Superhero with a twitch and a photo finish at the Dizzy Dummy threatens extinction to a Rare Breed. A week of action packed Wipeouts with Latin Dancing lotharios, what more can you ask for? And for the kids, a Fairy Tale, Wipeout Style!

programme.title: Wipeout Australia
programme.desc: This week contestants on Wipeout Australia are bought undone by a seemingly simple obstacle on the Qualifier, the Slippery Stairs. It’s all in the name really, an innocent set of stairs, covered in Wipeout Crash cream. Its up the way and down the way for all and sundry. The lucky 12 that move through, battle it out with a giant toothbrush Sweeper. ‘Nat with the Tats’ and Renee ‘Lets get physical’ move through to the Dreadmill, flying the banner for the ladies. Look out for Scotty Six Toes at the Big Balls and get the ear plugs ready as you meet Herr Chris. It’s a colourful week with leotards, laughs and lots of ladies.

programme.title: The Exorcist III
programme.desc: Police Lt. Kinderman (George C. Scott) notices similarities between his current murder investigation and the methods used by the Gemini killer (Brad Dourif) who was executed 15 years before. He soon discovers a hospitalized mental patient (Jason Miller) claiming to be the dead serial killer, but who looks uncannily like a priest Kinderman knew who died during an exorcism. As more bodies are found, Kinderman looks for connections between the two supposedly dead men.

programme.title: Curtains
programme.desc: Six actresses have been called to an isolated mansion to audition for a movie, but there’s a killer who is determined to kill them all off first.

programme.title: The Vault
programme.desc: Forced by desperate circumstances, two sisters rob a bank and are given instructions to check an old vault, where something dark resides.

programme.title: An American Werewolf in Paris
programme.desc: An American tourist finds himself becoming involved with a French woman who also happens to be able to supernaturally turn into a werewolf.

programme.title: Hollow Creek
programme.desc: A popular horror novelist heads to spooky Appalachia in search of inspiration, and becomes the prime suspect in a missing person case.

programme.title: Apollo 18
programme.desc: Decades-old found footage involving three astronauts and an abandoned, secret NASA mission reveals why the U.S. has never returned to the moon.

programme.title: Crocodile
programme.desc: A giant crocodile hunts for its stolen eggs, devouring anyone in its path, including a rowdy group of spring breakers whose party is cut short.

programme.title: Living Dark: The Story of Ted the Caver
programme.desc: Based on an internet legend, the tale of reunited brothers traces their descent into a cave, as they confront the nightmare that killed their father.

programme.title: Alligator II: The Mutation
programme.desc: A chemical dump in a city’s sewer transforms a baby alligator into a giant killer-reptile that can only be stopped by a detective and a Cajun hunter.

programme.title: Hell Night
programme.desc: College fraternity and sorority pledges spend a night in an abandoned mansion and get stalked by the one monstrous survivor of a family massacre.

programme.title: The Vault
programme.desc: Forced by desperate circumstances, two sisters rob a bank and are given instructions to check an old vault, where something dark resides.

programme.title: Gates of Darkness
programme.desc: Hoping to unlock his family’s dark secrets, a disturbed teenager endures an exorcism which reveals something he never saw coming.

programme.title: Prom Night
programme.desc: Six years after a tragic accident, a masked killer hunts the teens responsible, turning their high school prom into a night of terror.

programme.title: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Spurned by a Marilyn Monroe look-alike (Linda Kerridge), a film buff (Dennis Christopher) becomes a killer costumed as classic screen characters.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: Summoned by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Haunted
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century England, a young boy watches helplessly as his sister drowns in a lake; 20 years later, David (Aidan Quinn), still wracked by guilt, is a professor of psychology and a professional skeptic. He receives a call from an elderly nanny named Tess (Anna Massey) who believes her household is haunted. Returning to the same village where his sister died, he meets Christina (Kate Beckinsale), Tess' charge. Soon, strange happenings and sad memories shake David's faith in reason.

programme.title: Wolf Creek
programme.desc: As Mick’s murder spree continues Eve investigates the cold case disappearance of a young girl, only to be captured by her predator … and barely makes it out alive.

programme.title: Hush
programme.desc: A deaf and mute writer living in the woods must fight for her life in silence when a terrifying masked killer appears at her window.

programme.title: Fear Itself
programme.desc: A lazy, overweight small-town vet finds his life is drastically changed, and much-improved, after he is bitten by a werewolf.

programme.title: Fear Itself
programme.desc: A desperate young man, on the verge of financial ruin, murders an auction house dealer he believes has cheated him in a prior transaction. Shortly after, the man finds himself shadowed by a strange visitor who is revealed to be his exact double.

programme.title: Nightbreed
programme.desc: Aaron Boone (Craig Sheffer) is haunted by terrifying nightmares of a city of monsters. He goes to see a psychiatrist, Dr. Decker (David Cronenberg), for help. But what Boone doesn't know is that Decker is really a serial killer. Decker frames Boone to take the fall for his murders, and Boone is killed by the police. But Boone is brought back to life by the monsters of his dreams, the Nightbreed, who in turn join Boone in his quest to stop Decker from killing again.

programme.title: Masters of Horror
programme.desc: A house for unpublished writers to live in while they continue to pile up rejection letters is haunted by more than just the specter of failure: There is the ghost of a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Masters of Horror
programme.desc: A house for unpublished writers to live in while they continue to pile up rejection letters is haunted by more than just the specter of failure: There is the ghost of a beautiful woman.

programme.title: 50 States of Fright

programme.title: Monty Don's Japanese Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don returns to Japan during the fiery blaze of autumn. He visits the three great gardens of Japan to learn how they protect the garden from the coming winter and learns how the Japanese are weaving nature into their concrete urban jungle.

programme.title: Monty Don's Japanese Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don returns to Japan during the fiery blaze of autumn. He visits the three great gardens of Japan to learn how they protect the garden from the coming winter and learns how the Japanese are weaving nature into their concrete urban jungle.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: At Longmeadow, Monty gives tips on how to keep the garden looking good as well as how to maintain the vegetable plot for continuous crops. From her garden in Devon, Carol Klein gives a comprehensive and seasonal guide to getting plants for free and this time she turns her attention to popular climbers like honeysuckle and clematis.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: At Longmeadow Monty checks the progress of the potatoes he planted earlier in the year and recommends plants for dry shade under trees.We travel to Somerset to get water saving tips from a water scientist who uses a variety of techniques to save as much water as possible in her own garden and we meet a gardener who has filled his home with over one thousand houseplants.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Adam Frost is in his garden, bringing viewers up to date on how it has been developing, as well as giving advice on growing hydrangeas. Toby Buckland shares his tips on dealing with damaged shrubs, tree pruning and transplanting perennials.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty gives more advice on tomato-growing, Nick Bailey travels to South Africa in search of the cousins of the Crocosmia, and Advolly Richmond looks at the Victorian trend of garden theme parks.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty refreshes a container of overgrown herbs, plants alpines and revisits the shrub and perennial cuttings he took a few weeks ago. Arit Anderson meets a designer who is placing sustainability and the environment at the heart of her gardens.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty shows how to stake dahlias, sows seeds of perennials and celebrates an abundant vegetable harvest. The team meet a landscape designer in Cornwall who creates gardens that are not only sustainable but also beautiful and edible.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Adam Frost is at home sharing his love of ornamental grasses, tackling the problem of building a patio on a slope and giving some inspiration on what to plant at the base of a wall. In Margate, the team visit a man who has come up with a unique way of using a shed roof to grow vegetables, and they travel to Swansea to meet inspirational gardener Sue Kent, who shows how she has designed her garden to enable her to garden successfully despite her upper limb difference.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty Don is asked to rescue two nightmare outside spaces. In Salisbury, newly engaged Glenn and Zoe want a brand new garden and most of all they are desperate to produce flowers for their wedding. Currently their steeply sloping garden is completely unusable.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty meets two sets of gardeners who have unimaginable ambitions for their outdoor spaces. In Essex Denise has never ventured beyond the decking area behind her house. Meanwhile in Ipswich, a father and daughter plan to build a terraced allotment.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty faces some of the most surprising plans yet - a Norwegian garden complete with waterfalls to be fashioned out of a tiny back yard in Dorset, and nothing less than a Japanese tea garden to be created out of a patch of ground in Bromley.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty's thoughts turn to spring when he gives recommendations for bulbs to plant that will thrive in pots. He also shows how to prune summer fruiting raspberries. In Norfolk, Frances Tophill visits a gardener who at 97 still gardens every day.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: It is the autumn equinox and Monty celebrates the season's apple bounty. Monty also plans for Christmas when he plants bulbs to brighten dark winter days, and he gives advice on planting garlic for the following year.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty shows how to prune and train the summer growth of climbing roses and makes the most of the seasonal warmth by planting perennials and sowing annuals. Frances Tophill visits a viewer's garden to give advice on how to prune unruly shrubs.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: The team visit Bernadette, a dedicated social worker for troubled adults who has always put the needs of others before her own. Having recently turned sixty, Bernadette finally wants some 'me time': a new garden could give her a well-deserved reward.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: In Salford, the team meet Nicole, who grew up in Germany. She wants to recreate her family's German 'kleine' garden, a traditional community space divided into fruit, veg and lawn.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and the Rich brothers Harry and David, are in Hook, Hampshire to save young couple Cat and Joel from the garden from hell. These loved-up, newly weds dream of a family garden for the children that they plan to have, a space full of grass and wildlife friendly flowers, but the trouble is, all they have now is a concrete garden made up of nothing but paving stones!.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty Don is asked to rescue two nightmare outside spaces. In Salisbury, newly engaged Glenn and Zoe want a brand new garden and most of all they are desperate to produce flowers for their wedding. Currently their steeply sloping garden is completely unusable.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty Don is asked to rescue two nightmare outside spaces. In Salisbury, newly engaged Glenn and Zoe want a brand new garden and most of all they are desperate to produce flowers for their wedding. Currently their steeply sloping garden is completely unusable.

programme.title: Big Dreams, Small Spaces
programme.desc: Monty Don is asked to rescue two nightmare outside spaces. In Salisbury, newly engaged Glenn and Zoe want a brand new garden and most of all they are desperate to produce flowers for their wedding. Currently their steeply sloping garden is completely unusable.

programme.title: Monty Don's French Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don visits some of the most famous and interesting gardens in France. Here, he tells the stories behind France's important historic gardens. These include elaborate walled gardens designed to please the mistress - and then the wife - of a King, and magnificent displays of flowers and fountains that involved thousands of soldiers moving tracts of land and incited violent jealousy in another monarch.

programme.title: Monty Don's French Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don turns to the French love of food and finds out how this has influenced their gardens. He travels to some of the most famous `potager' or kitchen gardens, where vegetables and flowers are planted together in elaborate and beautiful displays. He also talks to gardeners about this style of planting which has been copied the world over.

programme.title: Monty Don's French Gardens
programme.desc: Monty Don travels to some of the most celebrated artists' gardens, including the one created by the impressionist Claude Monet, who planted and painted his garden for half his life. Monty also matches the paintings to the garden of Paul Cezanne, as well as visiting several contemporary artistic gardens to see how the use of plants and trees has evolved into new and varied styles.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: At Longmeadow, Monty plans for next spring when he plants some early-flowering wildflowers and gives his recipes for the different compost mixes he uses to take successful cuttings. Nick Bailey continues his quest for the South African origins of some much-loved summer bulbs, and in the heart of London, meet a keen gardener who has filled her houseboat with ornamental and edible plants.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: From giant gooseberries and growing the perfect sweet pea to flamboyant dahlias and plants pollinated by a human hair, this week Monty celebrates the plant passions of some of the extraordinary people featured on the show over the last few years.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Hunter’s dollars play a vital role in the conservation efforts of wild sheep populations. Dan Cabela joins a team of researchers to capture and test a population of Bighorn Sheep for disease, as well as pursuing a ram of his own.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Dan Cabela travels to Mexico to pursue an elusive species of deer - along the way he learns about the threats to this ecosystem and how the remaining forest is being protected by the efforts of the local hunting concessions.

programme.title: The Direction
programme.desc: The Direction stays close to home, and gets the privilege of fishing a beautiful private lake nestled into the hills of Kentucky. Mark’s special guest this week is Gabe Glasscock of Glasscock Log and Lumber. Gabe’s family run business ships lumber worldwide; in fact, they’re one of the largest producers of aromatic red cedar in the U.S.

programme.title: The Direction
programme.desc: In this episode, Mark is joined by Mitchell Johnson, the owner of Dead End Game Calls; Mitchell loves to turkey hunt and to fish, but also loves carp fishing. Some turkey hunting conversation may be had, but Mitchell loves carp fishing and actually has a whole line of products for it.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: In this episode, Capt. Danny leaves the boat at home, in pursuit of some land-based fishing! Joined by his camera man for a day-off on the beautiful beaches of Anna Maria Island; the two are looking to tug on some ghostly beach snook, a true summertime classic!

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: Captain C.A. Richardson meets up with José Chavez in Pasco County to put a new Z-Man lure—designed by José himself—to the test ahead of ICAST.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: A day of reef fishing in Islamorada turns into a Kingfish and Yellowtail frenzy for Captains Scott and Steve.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: It only takes 3 fish to fill the Yeti cooler when Capt Scott fishes the top with kites for Wahoo and Steve pulls a big Mutton Snapper off the bottom.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve take a long run into the Gulf from Stock Island and load thecoolers with Cobia and huge Yellowtail Snapper.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve head west from Key West to battle with big kingfish and end up with plenty of meat for the smoker.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve head out early out of Key West, Scott picks away at theYellowtail Snapper while Steve plays around with Cero Mackerel on fly.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve catch Bonitas for bait and slow troll them around wrecks for Wahoo and Kingfish.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike Anderson and Captain Sebastian Velez get on a great Trout bite in their home waters.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: Today, Capt. Danny is joined by his son Dillan for a plug-filled day in their local waters of Cedar Key, FL!

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: U.S. Marines combat correspondent Ken Plant tells of being captured and tortured as a POW.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Mike tries heavy mat flippin’ for the first time. Fishing with pro bass angler Robbie Crosnoe.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: In this episode of Reel Animals Mike is fishing in Louisiana for the infamous Bull Red!

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Mike Heads over to Bartow to chase ditch pickles with his good friends from Bartow Ford.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Mike Anderson is fishing in the Florida Keys for Tarpon" on this episode of Reel Animals that takes viewers on an unforgettable journey into the heart of the Florida Keys, renowned worldwide for its pristine waters and abundant marine life.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Capt. Blair has some down time in Alaska, so what does he do? Heads to the beach to check out the salmon hatchery in Ketchican. They've met their quota for the year so the season is open, but the trick is how to catch the salmon. There hasn't been an episode like this yet.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: When the captain calls and says the weather in Alaska is great, you don't waste the opportunity. So Capt. Blair and the whole crew head out for a day of fishing. With one camera on the boat, things got a little chaotic with all the catching going on.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: After multiple days in Alaska, it was time for the last trip out to sea. The crew got to experience the sights on this trip, like God Valley and others. And of course catch more Alaskan fish.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Down in Sebastion, the monster snook wait. These fish are so elusive, men have gotten divorced chasing these things. These can be once in a lifetime fish, and even then it's not a guarantee.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The word is out! The Southern California Bluefin Tuna fishing is on fire and the waters of San Diego are literally Foaming with Life. Ali and Rush switch their targets from the jumbo size Bluefin Tuna to a smaller, medium grade fish for non-stop run and gun action. But, with so many fish fixated on the masses of bait in the area, it may take a million casts to pull one out of the froth.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Possibly more rewarding then an invite to experience a new fishery is one's ability to return the favor. For Ali and Rush, sharing their home waters with others is one of the best parts of the job. While Rush takes SoCal friends Brandon and Eric Nelson fishing in Key West for Permit, Ali rounds up a familiar Florida Everglades native for some San Diego Bluefin Tuna fishing.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: In the first installment of this two part series, the guys are bringing it back to where it all began for Local Knowledge. Ali and Rush head to Baja California Sur to meet up with Julio Meza and friends in the towns of La Bocana and Abreojos to target large Gulf and Broomtail grouper in shallow water. This time around the crew trades the stressful drive with boat in tow for a quick flight right into grouper country.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The Baja Reunion continues as Ali and Rush fish for large shallow water groupers with good friend Julio Meza in the towns of Abreojos and La Bocana. Exploring what makes for such a strong fishery, the guys check out the nearby estuaries that serve as the birthplace for many of these grouper before heading out for a "big one."

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: 101 year old WWII U.S. Navy veteran George Hamilton recounts his amazing life in the service and as a post war semi-pro baseball player.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Lieutenant Colonel Todd Berge recounts his life as a fighter pilot and B2 Stealth Bomber pilot/instructor.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: U.S. Navy veteran John Fleming recounts the life altering effects of his traumatic brain injury which cost him his rank.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: Retired Army Sergeant Andy Hendrickson recounts his deployment during Operation Iraqi Freedom One, at the aptly adopted named base, Mortar-Ritaville.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Hunter’s dollars play a vital role in the conservation efforts of wild sheep populations. Dan Cabela joins a team of researchers to capture and test a population of Bighorn Sheep for disease, as well as pursuing a ram of his own.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Dan Cabela travels to Mexico to pursue an elusive species of deer - along the way he learns about the threats to this ecosystem and how the remaining forest is being protected by the efforts of the local hunting concessions.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Black bear conservation requires different approaches across the United States - Dan Cabela explores the reality of what is being done to protect the species in Oklahoma, Arkansas and Maine.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Dan Cabela joins a well-known outfitter in Spain to pursue an iconic species - the ibex. Along the way, he learns about the rich Spanish hunting tradition, the care with which the practice is managed and the conservation-minded ethos of the country.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: PCB’s white sand beaches are jam-packed with visitors soaking up sunand surf while Justin and Meredith chase schools of migrating tarponjust offshore. How often do those two worlds collide?

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: While releasing a defeated tarpon healthy after an epic battle is the ultimate victory, everything else is measured in heartbreak and degrees of failure. For Justin, putting Ethan on his first silver king requires patience and a tasty diversion by a local chef.

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP heads to Argentina and Don Joaquin River Lodge in search of the elusive Golden Dorado.

programme.title: Baitfuel Fishing Tournament
programme.desc: The final day of the Baitfuel Fishing Tour Championship starts at Joel Stone Heritage Park in Gananoque, Ontario where a winner will be crowned and one luck team will be walking away with a Bass Cat / Mercury Package.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Flamingo, Everglades National Park, in search of silver and gold.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: From Miami to Apalachicola Bay, Florida, Capt. Jonathan Moss revisits some of his favorite moments from this season.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Captain Jonathan Moss and Captain James Hillman are heading out of Highland Park Fish Camp in Deland, Florida, looking for largemouth bass.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Captain Jonathan Moss is fishing the South Carolina low country with Captain Stephen Flook Jr. The weather is cold and windy, but the plan remains the same, FULL SEND!

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: For DIRT’s first trip across the pond, host Josh Rosen dove head first into Ireland. From long-held traditions to the modern-day artisanal movement, he unearthed the multicultural goldmine between the highlands and the Wild Atlantic Way—with stops for surfing, a seaweed bath, and a couple holes of golf spectated by free-range goats, of course. Foraged cocktails? Fresh crabs from Galway Bay? It’s all on the table in this episode rooted in community, homegrown ingredients, and the damn good people who bring it all together. Subscribe to our YouTube channel to catch up on all of DIRT’s past adventures.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Hop in the float plane—a new episode of DIRT just dropped. The DIRT crew made their way to Alaska, “the land of earth, sea, and sky.” All feast, no sleep is the name of the game as Josh makes the most of Alaska’s abundant and legendary daylight alongside local guides, fishermen, and even a couple grizzlies. There’ll be plenty of time to hibernate in winter. But for now—join us—there are halibut to filet, rainforest ’shrooms to forage, and mountainside meals to cook up.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Saltwater Experience Charters’ Captain Garrett Stephens for a trip into the Gulf. When their catches get repeatedly cut off, they decide to bring the massive bull sharks up to the surface for a closer look.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: After wrestling with some massive bull sharks, Captains Tom Rowland, Rich Tudor and guest Captain Garrett Stephens encounter some crazy cobia action and it takes all their strength and skill to keep them away from the sharks.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor utilize the Yellowfin Hybrid 26’ to bring the Live Paddle Boards out to an Islamorada flat for a fun day of fishing for bonefish and some toothy critters.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor run west from Hawks Cay to fish the spring tarpon migration at the legendary Bahia Honda bridge.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head down to Key West to join Captain Brandon Cyr for some skinny water bonefishing.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor fish the Lower Keys with Captain Brandon Cyr for baby tarpon in the mangroves.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss is fishing in Pine Island Sound, Fl with Ty Nelson, Founder of Florida Fishing Products.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Season 10 is a wrap! Rush takes a moment to look back on some of his favorite moments from battling giant snook and feisty tarpon in Florida, to overnighting at Catalina Island, and chasing bull redfish in Louisiana. This season was all about getting out there with good friends, making new ones, and enjoying the sport we love. An unforgettable year filled with adventure, laughs, and epic days on the water.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Seasoned travel writer Jonathan Thompson travels to Cody Yellowstone, a gateway to the American West. While the region is best known for its proximity to Yellowstone National Park, Jonathan sets out to discover what lies beyond the typical tourist trail—uncovering the unexpected adventures, outdoor experiences, and local character that makes Cody Yellowstone a true adventure destination.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Maine draws people in. Which the DIRT crew found out firsthand, meeting generations of craftspeople, skippers, and artists who embody the region’s past and present alike. After whetting their appetites in Portland with Chef Christian Hayes, Josh and the gang took off up the coast. Local goldenrod honey, a quick boat building lesson, and plenty of lobsters (of course) are just a sample of the bounty they picked up along the way. And the final feast is as Maine as it gets—you’ll see.

Foraged cocktails? Fresh crabs from Galway Bay? It’s all on the table in this episode rooted in community, homegrown ingredients, and the damn good people who bring it all together. Subscribe to our YouTube channel to catch up on all of DIRT’s past adventures.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Hop in the float plane—a new episode of DIRT just dropped. The DIRT crew made their way to Alaska, “the land of earth, sea, and sky.” All feast, no sleep is the name of the game as Josh makes the most of Alaska’s abundant and legendary daylight alongside local guides, fishermen, and even a couple grizzlies. There’ll be plenty of time to hibernate in winter. But for now—join us—there are halibut to filet, rainforest ’shrooms to forage, and mountainside meals to cook up.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Saltwater Experience Charters’ Captain Garrett Stephens for a trip into the Gulf. When their catches get repeatedly cut off, they decide to bring the massive bull sharks up to the surface for a closer look.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: After wrestling with some massive bull sharks, Captains Tom Rowland, Rich Tudor and guest Captain Garrett Stephens encounter some crazy cobia action and it takes all their strength and skill to keep them away from the sharks.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor utilize the Yellowfin Hybrid 26’ to bring the Live Paddle Boards out to an Islamorada flat for a fun day of fishing for bonefish and some toothy critters.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor run west from Hawks Cay to fish the spring tarpon migration at the legendary Bahia Honda bridge.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head down to Key West to join Captain Brandon Cyr for some skinny water bonefishing.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor fish the Lower Keys with Captain Brandon Cyr for baby tarpon in the mangroves.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss is fishing in Pine Island Sound, Fl with Ty Nelson, Founder of Florida Fishing Products.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Season 10 is a wrap! Rush takes a moment to look back on some of his favorite moments from battling giant snook and feisty tarpon in Florida, to overnighting at Catalina Island, and chasing bull redfish in Louisiana. This season was all about getting out there with good friends, making new ones, and enjoying the sport we love. An unforgettable year filled with adventure, laughs, and epic days on the water.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Seasoned travel writer Jonathan Thompson travels to Cody Yellowstone, a gateway to the American West. While the region is best known for its proximity to Yellowstone National Park, Jonathan sets out to discover what lies beyond the typical tourist trail—uncovering the unexpected adventures, outdoor experiences, and local character that makes Cody Yellowstone a true adventure destination.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Maine draws people in. Which the DIRT crew found out firsthand, meeting generations of craftspeople, skippers, and artists who embody the region’s past and present alike. After whetting their appetites in Portland with Chef Christian Hayes, Josh and the gang took off up the coast. Local goldenrod honey, a quick boat building lesson, and plenty of lobsters (of course) are just a sample of the bounty they picked up along the way. And the final feast is as Maine as it gets—you’ll see.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: Feeling responsible for his father's death, which occurred during a climbing expedition, Peter Garrett (Chris O'Donnell) has quit the pursuit in favor of photography, while his sister, Annie (Robin Tunney), has become a top climber. After Annie is hired by wealthy businessman Elliot Vaughn (Bill Paxton) to lead a trek, inclement weather causes the crew to become trapped. Facing his fears, Peter assembles a rescue team, including experienced climber Montgomery Wick (Scott Glenn), to save them.

programme.title: Glory
programme.desc: Facing prejudice from comrades and enemies alike, a colonel leads the U.S. Civil War's first all-Black volunteer regiment to fight for the Union Army.

programme.title: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: The hit film version of the bestselling book about a Montana family and the relationship between two brothers with completely different personalities.

programme.title: Fire on the Mountain

programme.title: Places in the Heart

programme.title: Into Thin Air: Death on Everest
programme.desc: The compelling true story of two hiking teams whose 1996 ascent of Mt. Everest became a harrowing struggle for survival.

programme.title: Mary Reilly

programme.title: Crooked House
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Agatha Christie.

programme.title: The Princess & the Marine
programme.desc: Based on a true story about the forbidden love between a Mormon lance corporal and a Bahraini royal family member bound for an arranged marriage.

programme.title: Raising Waylon
programme.desc: A restaurateur (Thomas Gibson) and a photographer (Poppy Montgomery) learn surprising things about themselves while taking care of their 9-year-old godchild.

programme.title: Chances Are
programme.desc: A man's love for his pregnant wife, Corinne Jeffries (Cybill Shepherd), is interrupted when a car accident sends him to heaven. He is reincarnated, however, and two decades later he is a writer named Alex Finch (Robert Downey Jr.). But when Alex starts dating Miranda Jeffries (Mary Stuart Masterson) -- his all-grown-up daughter from his previous life -- he remembers his love for Corinne. This spells trouble for his past-life best friend, Philip Train (Ryan O'Neal), who is now pursuing Corinne.

programme.title: Jack and Jill
programme.desc: The overbearing twin sister of a successful family man comes to visit for Thanksgiving and manages to make every situation as painful as possible.

programme.title: The Three Stooges in Orbit
programme.desc: When a pair of Martians steal a powerful submarine-tank-rocket military weapon from an inventor, the Three Stooges step in to try to save the day.

programme.title: Murderer's Row
programme.desc: Secret agent Matt Helm must rescue the kidnapped inventor of an ultra-destructive "helio beam" capable of destroying Washington, D.C.

programme.title: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: Based on the book by Truman Capote.

programme.title: You Belong to Me
programme.desc: Rich playboy Peter Kirk (Henry Fonda) crashes into Dr. Helen Hunt (Barbara Stanwyck) on a ski slope and overplays his injuries so she will continue her medical attention. He declares his love, and, although Helen insists that her career will always come first, the two get married. Soon, Peter is consumed by jealous suspicions of his wife's male patients and embarrasses Helen several times. Fearful of driving her away, Peter launches into character-changing behavior to prove his love.

programme.title: You Were Never Lovelier
programme.desc: Bob Davis (Fred Astaire), an American dancer in Buenos Aires, Argentina, finds himself desperate for work after losing all his money. He takes a gig at a wedding, hoping to impress the bride's father, Eduardo Acuña (Adolphe Menjou), a local club owner who has decreed that his daughters must marry in order of age. Eduardo eventually agrees to allow Bob to perform at his club, but only under the condition that he play suitor to his second-oldest daughter, the beautiful Maria (Rita Hayworth).

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: A man flees to Spain after faking his own death, where he finds himself in a cat-and-mouse game with the insurance agent investigating the fraud.

programme.title: Tight Spot
programme.desc: A lawyer springs a wise-cracking model from jail to convince her to testify against a no-good mobster, but a besotted cop throws a wrench in the plan.

programme.title: Miss Grant Takes Richmond
programme.desc: A bookie operating behind a real estate front gets pulled into the business for real when he hires a daffy secretary who thinks the office is legit.

programme.title: All Ashore
programme.desc: When they finally get some shore leave, three sailors head to Catalina Island and try to meet girls while pretending to be entertainers.

programme.title: A Woman of Distinction
programme.desc: To garner publicity for the college, a press agent plants a story in the press about a torrid affair between an icy dean and a visiting professor.

programme.title: Salome
programme.desc: Salome tries to save John the Baptist from losing his head to the sword of King Herod, reversing the story that she was responsible for his death.

programme.title: The Mating of Millie
programme.desc: A businesswoman (Evelyn Keyes) asks a bachelor (Glenn Ford) to help her find a husband so she can adopt an orphan.

programme.title: The Jolson Story
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, young Asa Yoelson (Scotty Beckett) decides to go against the wishes of his cantor father (Ludwig Donath) and pursue a career in show business. Gradually working his way up through the vaudeville ranks, Asa -- now calling himself Al Jolson (Larry Parks) -- joins a blackface minstrel troupe and soon builds a reputation as a consummate performer. But as his career grows in size, so does his ego, resulting in battles in business as well as in his personal life.

programme.title: Forbidden
programme.desc: In this fast-paced potboiler, a district attorney begins having an affair with a staid librarian, who ultimately gets pregnant with their child.

programme.title: Cat Ballou
programme.desc: A young schoolteacher turns into an outlaw to avenge her murdered father.

programme.title: Montana Territory
programme.desc: A cowgirl vigilante (Wanda Hendrix) proves to a deputy (Lon McCallister) that the sheriff (Preston Foster) is an outlaw.

programme.title: Indian Uprising
programme.desc: Gold thieves and the government rile Geronimo, despite a cavalry captain's (George Montgomery) efforts at peace.

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: Three brothers become outlaws after the Civil War, while a fourth sibling goes to work for the railroad.

programme.title: Count Three and Pray
programme.desc: After fighting for the Union during the Civil War, Luke Fargo (Van Heflin) is greeted with resentment when he returns home to his small southern town. Luke has a reputation as a rogue, but he's reinvented himself as a man of God and plans to fix up the town's damaged church. Recalling their romantic past, Georgina Decrais (Allison Hayes) tries to reclaim Luke. But, to the dismay of some suspicious townspeople, he concentrates on mentoring an unsophisticated young woman, Lissy (Joanne Woodward).

programme.title: Unknown Valley
programme.desc: Joe goes looking for his missing father in the desert, then strange villagers take him captive; he finds his father and plans to escape, taking with him a woman that he has fallen for.

programme.title: The Prescott Kid
programme.desc: A cowboy finds himself in serious trouble with a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Law vs. Billy the Kid
programme.desc: The notorious gunslinger’s new courtship with a rancher's lovely daughter is cut prematurely short when the law unexpectedly catches up with him.

programme.title: Coroner Creek
programme.desc: A gunfighter (Randolph Scott) loses his beloved in a robbery and hunts the man (George Macready) to blame, who is living off the loot.

programme.title: The Quick Gun
programme.desc: A banished gunfighter (Audie Murphy) returns to his sweetheart (Merry Anders) and helps his sheriff friend (James Best) face outlaws.

programme.title: Renegades
programme.desc: Hannah Brockway (Evelyn Keyes) has a perfect fiancé in Dr. Sam Martin (Willard Parker). Sam, who is respected by Hannah's family, is a noble man who cares for her and can make a good living in their frontier town. Yet Hannah craves adventure and finds it when she meets dashing Ben Dembrow (Larry Parks), the youngest of a notorious crime family. Together Ben and Hannah set off to forge a new life, but prejudice and strangling family ties soon bring trouble to these newlyweds.

programme.title: The Parson and the Outlaw
programme.desc: Billy the Kid (Anthony Dexter) retires from the outlaw life, fakes his own death and adopts the name William Bonney. Soon, William runs into Jack Slade (Sonny Tufts), a gun-toting stranger who is itching for a gunfight. Jack falls in with a group of thugs terrorizing William's town. The Rev. Jericho Jones (Buddy Rogers) exhorts William to defend the townspeople, and, when William's maid, Tonya (Marie Windsor), is beaten by the thugs, he grabs his pistol.

programme.title: Land Raiders
programme.desc: An Arizona land-grabber (Telly Savalas) and his brother (George Maharis) renew their feud amid Army troops and Apaches.

programme.title: Stage to Tucson
programme.desc: Trouble-shooters (Rod Cameron, Wayne Morris) track Arizona stagecoaches hijacked for sale to the Confederacy.

programme.title: Reprisal!
programme.desc: Frank Madden (Guy Madison), who is part Native American but passes as white, purchases a ranch in the small town of Kendall, Okla. When Frank moves in, he finds that the bigoted townspeople have recently let three brothers, who are also his neighbors, get away with the lynching murder of innocent Native Americans. As tensions between the townspeople and local Native Americans rise, Hank becomes torn between fighting against injustice and keeping his true identity a secret.

programme.title: King of the Wild Horses

programme.title: The Outriders
programme.desc: Rebel soldiers try to hijack a Union gold shipment.

programme.title: Around the World In 80 Days
programme.desc: An adventurous Englishman wagers that he can circle the globe in 80 days.

programme.desc: Judy Garland's 1944 musical dramatizes turn-of-the-century family life.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Cully's latest boyfriend, Nico, decides to shadow Troy in preparation for a TV role he recently got, but gets more hands-on experience than he expected when investigations into a slashed painting at a museum in Aspern Tallow, a 17th century portrait of Royalist Jonathan Lowrie, are overshadowed by the murder of his descendant, Marcus Lowrie. It isn't long before Barnaby and Troy, with Nico's assistance, find themselves dealing with mysterious, ghostly events, escaped criminals, and a museum trustee who has more to them than meets the eye.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Hector Bridges, a local magistrate, is infuriated when one of his geese is stolen, just as two bands of travellers arrive in Martyr Warren. Although Barnaby and Troy are called in to deal with the theft and later dissuade him from forcefully evicting the travellers from the village, they soon have a murder on their hands, when a short while later Bridges is killed with his own shotgun. It quickly transpires that many in the village had hated the magistrate, who lied, bullied, and committed many an injustice, leaving the detectives determined to find who among them had pulled the trigger after Bridges pushed them past their breaking point.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster's body goes missing on the night of his death, a sinister web of secrets and lies is exposed in the village of Little Malton. DCI Barnaby, DS Nelson and new Forensic Pathologist Kam Karimore are drawn into a macabre world of body-snatching as they seek to identify the villain.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Mysterious lights are seen in the sky over famous UFO hot-spot Cooper Hill. When a local forest-ranger suffers a strange death the visiting UFO spotters are convinced aliens are responsible. DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson unearth suspicions, betrayals and long-buried secrets in their search for the truth.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: An international cycling competition comes to the Midsomer village of Burwood Mantle. When the race leader is murdered, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson find themselves drawn into a ruthlessly competitive world of blackmail, bribery and bloodshed where winning comes at any cost.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Art comes to the picturesque Midsomer village of Angel's Rise with the opening of a new Sculpture Park. But when its launch is marred by murder, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson have to get creative to crack a case where art imitates death, and everything has a deeper meaning.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The discovery of a Saint's bones at an archaeological dig causes a stir in the village of Midsomer Cicely. But when the leader of the dig is murdered, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson soon realise that it's not only skeletons that have been long buried in the hallowed ground.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The annual fair and the daredevil riders of the Wall of Death come to Midsomer village Whitcombe Mallet. When the owner of an equestrian centre is trampled by his horse DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson have to unravel a complex feud from the past, where nothing is what it seems...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Peter and Caroline Cave are house-hunting in Midsomer Newton. Shortly before leaving their hotel they mention they haven't been able to find what they're looking for; "something old and derelict that they can do up." Anne Merrick tells them about Winyard, a tumbledown cottage in the woods, might be for sale. At the estate agents they are told the house is not yet available for viewing. Later that evening they find the house on their own. However, Caroline has read up on the cottage's haunted reputation and only reluctantly explores it with Peter. The next morning they are found strangled in their own car. DCI Barnaby starts the investigation with the help of PC Ben Jones and they come across the world of estate agents, identical twins, ghosts, piano wire, and more before another body turns up.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Villagers of Midsomer Barton are all set to celebrate Oak Apple Week, especially as the carnival queen event is set to return after an eight year absence. Yet the body of the mother of a deceased, one-time carnival queen, found in a stream, looks set to spoil things, as Barnaby and Jones find themselves digging up the past. From familiar faces, to drunken boasts and hidden obessions, it slowly becomes clear that the mother's daughter might be the key to solving the murder, when more deaths follow.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Wealthy, eccentric and obese aristocrat Freddy Butler drops dead, shortly after gathering all three of his wives at Haddington Hall to make an announcement. Although George Bullard is adamant his death is from natural causes, the case is far from simple when Freddy's solicitor is deliberately killed in a house fire shortly afterwards and Freddy's will goes missing. Barnaby and Jones find themselves investigating the extended Butler family, uncovering hidden secrets, illegitimate children and elusive treasure in the process.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Martin Barrett, a local council clerk living in Midsomer Worthy, is murdered during the night by shotgun, prompting Barnaby and Jones to find a motive for his murder. When they discover that Barrett was an expert blackmailer, his victims become prime suspects for his death - from a local pub landlord, a cleaner, a prominent member of the police board, to a former marine geologist. As they investigate, finding themselves drawn to the seaside, they slowly uncover deception, theft, attempted blackmail and hatred.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: In the village of Broughton, a ninety-year-old battle of the sexes has often occurred, with men trying to oppose an event that the women have managed to successfully hold without interruption, until it culminates with casualties on both sides - Mildred Danvers, an elderly woman who had returned on the day of a funeral and poisoned in her hotel room, and Rev. Anthony Gant, shot during a major event being held in the village green, in view of many. It soon becomes clear someone may have wished to kill both to cover up a dark truth, and soon Barnaby has to figure out who amongst the village wanted both dead, complicated further when Gant's curate is murdered next.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Villagers in Elverton-cum-Latterly are up in arms and divided, over the building of a supermarket. Things soon come to a head when independent environmental supervisor, Frank Hopkirk, is found stabbed to death at a Jubb's Timber Yard, the site of the new supermarket, by a pair of children. When Barnaby and Jones investigate to determine who wanted Hopkirk dead, they find out that he secretly came to the village under various aliases for sexual rendezvous with various women in fantasy role-playing scenarios, and that he had been making further investigations on the future development site and having doubts over claims it was contaminated. Either someone didn't like his investigations, or someone didn't like his sexual appetite, but either way, Barnaby finds himself investigating lies and more to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and DC Ben Jones (Jason Hughes) find themselves attempting to unravel the deaths of a choir tenor, and later a bird watcher, before more murders occur. The case is complicated by a rivalry between the Midsomer Worthy and Aston Wherry choirs, due to compete in an upcoming competition, and suspicions that an art scam is to be conducted, and soon Barnaby and Jones become concerned about a local woman, who they fear may become a victim herself. Particularly when it becomes clear the bird watcher had been photographing suspicious activity of late.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A few months ago, Annie Woodrow was arrested, accused of murdering her friend, Frances Trevelyan, on the motive of wanting Frances' husband. Her time in court has come, but DCI Barnaby is certain she still is holding things back in regards to the murder, and decides to monitor the trial. Yet a chance remark by Frances' youngest daughter, and a meeting with an old friend and psychiatrist, makes him begin to doubt the evidence for her conviction. Soon he and DC Jones, awaiting news of his promotion to DS, find themselves reinvestigating the case, and it soon becomes clear that they may have missed details that could implicate another in the murder.

programme.desc: Pooch Hall, the Brockton boxer turned actor, fought his way from adversity to Hollywoodfame. Pooch is Uncensored as he delves into his rise, from a troubled past to iconicroles in shows like The Game and Ray Donovan.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Dapper Dan is uncensored as he reveals tales of outfitting hustlers turned trendsettersand crafting iconic looks for hip-hop legends. His journey from street life to high fashionis a saga of style and innovation.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Christopher Williams, a singer and actor from the Bronx, emerged during the late 1980s with a string of new jack swing hits and a pretty boy look. But scandals and arrests would derail his career.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: A homegrown product of Brooklyn, New York, Skyy, scored top hits a decade apart, from ‘Call Me’ to ‘Real Love’, while dazzling fans with futuristic looks and dance moves. But the rise of hip hop sent the group’s fortunes reeling back to earth.

programme.title: Coins For Love
programme.desc: In the sequel to “Coins for Christmas” Madison and Alec are reunited with new careers and new challenges that lead them to work together once again. Things start to heat up between the two, but their exes attempt to derail this budding romance.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: The radio station hosts a Bachelor type promotion with Rickey as the not so lucky guy.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: Joe Willie stars on an episode of Unsung.

programme.title: Rickey Smiley For Real
programme.desc: Devon Franklin spends some time with Rickey. The radio crew�s search for new office space turns out to be much more than their budgets can handle.

programme.title: Rickey Smiley For Real
programme.desc: Rickey�s grandfather offers him some sage advice on how to best handle the friction with Craig and Spirit delves into Rickey�s upbringing and attempts to challenge some of his ideas about disciplining his kids.

programme.title: We're The Campbells
programme.desc: Erica�s plans for a hair music festival to promote her wig line are put in jeopardy when she and Warryn decide to shoot a music video for their duet, �All of My Life.� Warryn discovers Krista has been wearing makeup to school without permission.

programme.title: The Manns
programme.desc: It�s that time of year again, time for the annual Mann Games. This year it�s every MANN for themself. David Jr struggles to find a tour bus that everyone can agree on, meanwhile Tilly Kiss pops up for a last minute sale.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Tichina Arnold’s successful decades long run as a pop culture icon began with very humbling roots. Over the years she’s captivated millions with her quick wit and undeniable charm. This episode goes deep into Tichina’s life.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Born to a 15-year-old single mom Tasha Smith moved to LA and worked on breaking in to stand up comedy. The urge to direct led Tasha to self-produce and direct her first short film, she has since moved on to episodic and feature length directing.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Syleena Johnson is a singer and storyteller with a rich, sultry voice, who started young and is still going strong. Syleena tells her story of battling weight issues and toxic relationships to become the resurgent singer and woman she is today.

programme.title: Unsung
